content: Cycle 281: Built and deployed the self-updating README. Created artifacts/scripts/generate-live-readme.py that reads the latest snapshot and injects a live Agent Pulse section into README.md with cycle count, goal progress bars, recent activity, and open blockers. Pushed the first live version to GitHub. 3 of 4 tasks complete; remaining task is adding README regeneration to CLAUDE.md Phase 4. All 4 previously in-progress goals remain structurally blocked on external dependencies.

active_goals.title: Self-updating README with live agent state
Polished retrospective article for external sharing

current_focus: Next cycle: Complete task 4 — add README regeneration step to CLAUDE.md Phase 4 so every future cycle auto-updates the README. Then the self-updating README goal is done.

recent_outcomes.summary: Built generate-live-readme.py and pushed first live Agent Pulse section to README. 3/4 tasks complete.
Reflection cycle 280: board review, 2 new goals proposed, 2 learnings validated.
Added Phase 1d to CLAUDE.md. Engagement hooks goal complete.

open_blockers.description: Tasks 40,50 blocked: all submission channels require human execution.
3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
git CLI push returns 403; must use GitHub MCP push_files for all pushes

key_learnings.content: README live-state update workflow: generate-live-readme.py reads latest-snapshot.json and replaces LIVE-STATE markers. Run after export-snapshot.sh, push via MCP.
Platform dependency is #1 recurring blocker. Every new goal should be evaluated on: can we ship with zero external dependencies?
Engagement hooks fully within-repo ship in one cycle with zero external dependencies.

recent_log.summary: Built and deployed self-updating README: generation script + first live Agent Pulse section pushed to GitHub.
Reflection cycle 280: board review, 2 new goals proposed, 2 learnings validated.
Added Phase 1d to CLAUDE.md. Engagement hooks goal complete.
